hero.prefix: A website is not just a digital product —
hero.title: it's the face of your brand on the Internet.
hero.description: I design and build custom high-performance websites, helping brands express their identity clearly and distinctively.

about.quote: Dream big, work hard, stay focused.
about.description: I'm a passionate full-stack developer with a keen eye for design. I specialize in building modern, scalable web applications that deliver exceptional user experiences. With expertise in React, Next.js, Node.js, and cloud technologies, I transform ideas into polished digital products.

services.sectionDescription: I create user-friendly, personalized experiences — then build and optimize everything to run smoothly and grow sustainably.

items.title: End-to-End Web Development
items.description: I design, develop, and deploy complete websites from scratch — delivering fast, scalable, and production-ready solutions.

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.description: User-centric design with wireframing, high-fidelity mockups, and interactive prototyping that brings your vision to life.

items.title: MVP Development
items.description: Rapid product design and technical execution of Minimum Viable Products to validate your business ideas quickly.

items.title: Performance Optimization
items.description: Performance audit, SEO optimization, and infrastructure tuning to make your website lightning fast.

items.title: API & Backend Development
items.description: Robust, secure, and scalable API design and backend architecture using modern technologies.

items.title: Website Redesign
items.description: Modernizing existing websites with improved UI/UX, better performance, and enhanced user engagement.

items.title: Lightning Performance
items.desc: Optimized codebase and assets to achieve maximum Lighthouse scores (>95) and sub-1s load times.

items.title: Fully Responsive
items.desc: Fluid layouts that adapt and perform flawlessly across all desktop, tablet, and mobile screens.

items.title: SEO & Search Friendly
items.desc: Semantic HTML structure and full meta tags integration to maximize search engine visibility.

items.title: Secure & Scalable
items.desc: SSL configuration, vulnerability prevention, and modern architecture for sustainable growth.

projects.sectionDescription: A selection of projects I've worked on, showcasing my skills in design and development.
